plan_title: Extend Step Architecture for Per-Step Agent Configuration
plan_summary: Implement per-step agent configuration support by extending StepDefinition and DevinWrapper classes, adding validation to saga validator, and comprehensive testing. Implementation follows existing patterns and maintains backward compatibility.

impacted_layers.changes: Add agent_config field and path resolution
Update command building to use step-specific config

implementation_steps.title: Extend StepDefinition Class
implementation_steps.description: Add agent_config field to StepDefinition and implement path resolution
tasks: Add agent_config field to __init__() - extract from data dict
Handle empty/null values - treat as not specified
Support both relative and absolute paths
acceptance_criteria: StepDefinition accepts agent_config field from step.json
get_agent_config_path() returns None if agent_config not specified
Relative paths resolve to step directory
Empty/null values treated as not specified

implementation_steps.title: Update DevinWrapper.build_devin_command()
implementation_steps.description: Modify command building to use step-specific config if available
tasks: Fall back to global config if not specified
acceptance_criteria: DevinWrapper uses step-specific config if available
Falls back to global config if agent_config not specified
Path is correctly resolved before passing to CLI

implementation_steps.title: Add Validation to Saga Validator
implementation_steps.description: Validate agent_config file existence during saga validation
acceptance_criteria: Saga validation fails if agent_config file missing
Error message indicates missing file path
Validation passes if agent_config file exists
Validation passes if agent_config not specified

implementation_steps.title: Write Unit Tests for StepDefinition
implementation_steps.description: Comprehensive unit tests for StepDefinition changes
tasks: Test path resolution - edge cases (../, empty, null)
acceptance_criteria: Coverage includes happy path and edge cases

implementation_steps.title: Write Unit Tests for DevinWrapper
implementation_steps.description: Unit tests for DevinWrapper command building changes
tasks: Test command building with step-specific config
Test command building without step-specific config
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify step-specific config is used

implementation_steps.title: Write Integration Tests
implementation_steps.description: Integration tests for saga execution with step-specific configs
tasks: Test saga execution with step-specific config
Test saga validation with missing config file
Test saga validation with valid config file
Test backward compatibility with existing steps
dependencies: Step 3: Add Validation to Saga Validator

implementation_steps.title: Verify Backward Compatibility
implementation_steps.description: Run full test suite to ensure no regressions
dependencies: Step 4: Write Unit Tests for StepDefinition
Step 5: Write Unit Tests for DevinWrapper

implementation_steps.title: Update Documentation and Examples
implementation_steps.description: Document new feature and provide examples
tasks: Document permission model and common patterns

regression_tests.description: Verify no regressions in existing functionality

risks_and_mitigations.impact: All existing steps fail to execute
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Make agent_config optional; implement fallback to global config
risks_and_mitigations.verification: Run full test suite; verify all existing steps still work

risks_and_mitigations.impact: Config paths resolved incorrectly; security issues
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Use pathlib for safe path handling; comprehensive unit tests
risks_and_mitigations.verification: Unit tests for relative, absolute, and edge case paths

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Devin CLI doesn't support --agent-config in non-interactive mode
risks_and_mitigations.impact: Feature doesn't work; steps fail to execute
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Verify flag support before implementation; document requirement
risks_and_mitigations.verification: Manual testing with Devin CLI; check version compatibility

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Config validation errors not clear to users
risks_and_mitigations.impact: Users confused about what went wrong
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Provide detailed error messages in saga validator
risks_and_mitigations.verification: Test error messages; ensure they guide users to solution

risks_and_mitigations.impact: Config file not readable; step fails
risks_and_mitigations.verification: Unit tests for permission denied scenarios

risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Use efficient pathlib operations; cache resolved paths if needed

critical_path: Step 3: Add Validation to Saga Validator
parallel_opportunities: Steps 4 and 5 can run in parallel (independent unit tests)

effort_estimation.notes: Estimates assume experienced Python developer familiar with codebase. Includes time for code review and iteration.

success_criteria: Code follows existing patterns and style
